name: The Reverse ETL
effect: Extract transformed data from the warehouse and push it back into operational systems. This card is considered activated.

clauses.name: ACTIVATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If data reaches a downstream tool: The warehouse is considered a source of truth.

clauses.name: DRIFT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the warehouse and the operational system disagree: The most recently synced value is considered correct until the next sync.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next quarter: No one remembers which direction the data is supposed to flow.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Why was it in the warehouse if it needed to be here?
